knowledge.html:
XII. COMPARISON (SO SÁNH)

EQUAL COMPARISON (SO SÁNH BANG)

1. Khẳng định:

S + tobe + as + adj + as + noun/pronoun.
S + V + as + adv + as + noun/pronoun.
Ex: Lan is as young as Hoa. / Mai dances as beautifully as Hue.

2. Phủ định:

S + tobe + not + as/so + adj + as + noun/pronoun.
S + V + not + as/so + adv + as + noun/pronoun.
Ex: Lan isn't as/so young as Hoa.

3. Cấu trúc "the same as":

S + tobe/V + the same + (noun) + as + noun/pronoun.
Ex: This book is the same as that one. / She has the same height as my sister.

COMPARATIVE (SO SÁNH HON)

1. Tính từ/trạng từ ngan:

S + tobe + adj-er + than + noun/pronoun.
S + V + adv-er + than + noun/pronoun.
Ex: My house is smaller than her house. / She runs faster than me.

Lưu ý ve cach them "er":

  • Ket thuc bang "e" => them "r": large => larger
  • Ket thuc bang 1 nguyên âm + 1 phụ âm => gap doi phụ âm cuoi: big => bigger, hot => hotter
  • Ket thuc bang "y" => doi "y" thanh "i" roi them "er": noisy => noisier
  • Tính từ 2 am tiet ket thuc bang "y, ow, er, et, el" van chia theo công thức ngan: narrow => narrower, happy => happier

Cac trạng từ bo nghia: much, far, a bit, a little, a lot.

2. Tính từ/trạng từ dai:

S + tobe + more + adj + than + noun/pronoun.
S + V + more + adv + than + noun/pronoun.
Ex: Jenny is more beautiful than me. / Tom talks more slowly than me.

SUPERLATIVE (SO SÁNH NHAT)

1. Tính từ/trạng từ ngan:

S + tobe + the + adj-est + noun/pronoun.
S + V + the + adv-est + noun/pronoun.
Ex: This is the longest river in the world. / I jump the highest in my class.

2. Tính từ/trạng từ dai:

S + tobe + the most + adj + noun/pronoun.
S + V + the most + adv + noun/pronoun.
Ex: Jenny is the most beautiful in my class.

Bang tính từ/trạng từ bat quy tắc

Tính từ/trạng từSo sánh honSo sánh nhatNghia
Good/wellBetterThe bestTot
Bad/badlyWorseThe worstTe
LittleLessThe leastIt
Much/manyMoreThe mostNhieu
FarFarther/FurtherThe farthest/The furthestXa / Them nua
OldOlder/ElderThe oldest/The eldestGia / Anh (chi) trong nha

DOUBLE COMPARATIVE (SO SÁNH KEP)

1. Cung 1 tính từ (cang ngay cang...)

a. Tính từ/trạng từ ngan:
S + tobe + adj-er + and + adj-er.
S + V + adv-er + and + adv-er.

b. Tính từ/trạng từ dai:
S + tobe + more and more + adj.
S + V + more and more + adv.
Ex: It is getting hotter and hotter.
Ex: The lessons are getting more and more difficult.

2. Hai tính từ khac nhau (cang...thi cang...)

The + comparative + S + tobe/V, the + comparative + S + tobe/V.
Ex: The taller she gets, the thinner she is.
Ex: The more beautiful she is, the more attractive she gets.
Lưu ý: Neu tuc tu la danh từ thi dat ngay sau tính từ so sánh.
Ex: The more English vocabulary we know, the better we speak.

exercises.question: _____ other mammals, whales do not have a sense of smell.
exercises.explanation: 'Unlike' = khong giong nhu. Dung de so sánh su khac biet.

exercises.question: The stomach of a cow, _____ that of other ruminants, is divided into four compartments.
exercises.explanation: 'like' = giong nhu, dung de so sánh.

exercises.question: The Romans used central heating systems very much like _____.
options: D. the systems which are now
exercises.explanation: 'those of today' = nhung he thong cua ngay nay. 'those' thay the cho 'systems'.

exercises.question: She speaks English as _____ as her friend does.
exercises.explanation: So sánh bang: as + adv + as. 'well' la trạng từ bo nghia cho động từ 'speaks'.

exercises.question: It's _____ to go by bus than a car.
exercises.explanation: 'cheap' la tính từ ngan => them '-er': cheaper. Co 'than' => so sánh hon.

exercises.question: The test is not _____ difficult _____ it was last year.
options: D. A and B are correct
exercises.explanation: Phủ định: not as...as = not so...as. Ca A va B deu dung.

exercises.question: He works more _____ than she does.
exercises.explanation: So sánh hon voi trạng từ: more + adv => 'more slowly'.

exercises.question: This hotel must be _____ in this city.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhat: the most + adj dai => 'the most expensive'.

exercises.question: This river is _____ than that river.
exercises.explanation: 'narrow' la tính từ ngan (2 am tiet ket thuc bang -ow) => narrower.

exercises.question: Did you know your English teacher and your mother are the same _____?
exercises.explanation: 'the same + noun' => 'the same age'.

exercises.question: This hotel was _____ that one we had stayed at before.
exercises.explanation: So sánh hon: more + adj dai + than.

exercises.question: He has just married a girl who is _____ him.
exercises.explanation: So luong + so sánh hon + than: '3 years older than'.

exercises.question: We were disappointed as the film was _____ than we expected.
exercises.explanation: 'disappointed' => phim kem hon ky vong => 'less entertaining than'.

exercises.question: The Pacific Ocean is the world's _____ ocean.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhat: the world's + adj-est => 'largest'.

exercises.question: It's _____ film I've ever seen.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhat voi 'ever': the most + adj dai => 'the most boring'.

exercises.question: The _____ trend in the graph is the improvement in people's living standard between 1990 and 2000.
exercises.explanation: 'the second + superlative' = lon thu hai => 'the second biggest'.

exercises.question: Gold price is going up _____.
exercises.explanation: So sánh kep voi tính từ ngan: adj-er + and + adj-er => 'higher and higher'.

exercises.question: Our examinations are getting _____.
options: A. more difficult and more difficult
exercises.explanation: So sánh kep voi tính từ dai: more and more + adj => 'more and more difficult'.

exercises.question: Don't worry! Everything seems to be _____.
exercises.explanation: So sánh kep voi 'good': better and better.

exercises.question: _____ I try to forget the terrible experience, _____ I remember it.
exercises.explanation: So sánh kep 2 tính từ: The + comparative..., the + comparative => 'The more..., the harder'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Minh can play table tennis better more than I can.
exercises.correctSentence: Minh can play table tennis better than I can.
exercises.explanation: 'better' da la dang so sánh hon roi, khong can them 'more'.

exercises.wrongSentence: His father's health gets worst and worst.
exercises.correctSentence: His father's health gets worse and worse.
exercises.explanation: So sánh kep dung dang so sánh hon: worse and worse (khong phai superlative).

exercises.wrongSentence: Not everyone has realized that the most largest organ of the human body is the skin.
exercises.correctSentence: Not everyone has realized that the largest organ of the human body is the skin.
exercises.explanation: Khong dung 'most' truoc tính từ da co duoi '-est'. Chi can 'the largest'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The more fast you drive, the more dangerous you get.
exercises.correctSentence: The faster you drive, the more dangerous you get.
exercises.explanation: 'fast' la tính từ ngan => so sánh hon: faster, khong dung 'more fast'.

exercises.wrongSentence: New York is the larger of all American cities.
exercises.correctSentence: New York is the largest of all American cities.
exercises.explanation: 'of all' => so sánh nhat => 'the largest'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The more they advertise, the least expensive things are.
exercises.correctSentence: The more they advertise, the less expensive things are.
exercises.explanation: So sánh kep: The + comparative => 'the less expensive' (khong phai superlative 'least').

exercises.wrongSentence: Nam plays the piano better than I am.
exercises.correctSentence: Nam plays the piano better than I do.
exercises.explanation: 'plays' la động từ thuong => tro động từ la 'do', khong phai 'am'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Louise is the more capable of the three girls who have tried out for the part in the play.
exercises.correctSentence: Louise is the most capable of the three girls who have tried out for the part in the play.
exercises.explanation: 'of the three girls' => so sánh nhat (tu 3 tro len) => 'the most capable'.

exercises.wrongSentence: This telephone isn't as cheap the other one, but it works much better.
exercises.correctSentence: This telephone isn't as cheap as the other one, but it works much better.
exercises.explanation: So sánh bang: as + adj + as. Thieu 'as' thu hai.

exercises.wrongSentence: Many people believe that New York is the most great city in America.
exercises.correctSentence: Many people believe that New York is the greatest city in America.
exercises.explanation: 'great' la tính từ ngan => so sánh nhat: the greatest, khong dung 'the most great'.

exercises.wrongSentence: In 1925, he joined the advertising department of Doubleday Page and Company, one of the most large publishing houses in New York.
exercises.correctSentence: In 1925, he joined the advertising department of Doubleday Page and Company, one of the largest publishing houses in New York.
exercises.explanation: 'large' la tính từ ngan => the largest.

exercises.wrongSentence: Most babies will grow up not be as cleverer as their parents.
exercises.correctSentence: Most babies will grow up not be as clever as their parents.
exercises.explanation: So sánh bang: as + adj (nguyen the) + as. Khong dung dang so sánh hon.

exercises.original: I didn't spend as much money as you.
exercises.answer: You spent more money than I did.
exercises.explanation: not as much as => more than (dao lai).

exercises.original: No river in the world is longer than the Nile.
exercises.answer: The Nile is the longest river in the world.
exercises.explanation: No...longer than => the longest (chuyen sang so sánh nhat).

exercises.original: Lan is better cook than Hoa.
exercises.answer: Hoa can't cook as well as Lan.
exercises.explanation: A is better than B => B can't...as well as A.

exercises.original: No restaurant in the city is better than that one.
exercises.answer: That restaurant is the best in the city.
exercises.explanation: No...better than => the best.

exercises.original: This watch is worse than that one.
exercises.answer: That watch is better than this one.
exercises.explanation: A worse than B => B better than A.

exercises.original: My sister writes more carefully than she did.
exercises.answer: My sister used to write less carefully than she does now.
exercises.explanation: Truoc day viet it can than hon bay gio => used to write less carefully.

exercises.original: This story is more interesting than any other story that I have ever read.
exercises.answer: This is the most interesting story that I have ever read.
exercises.explanation: more...than any other => the most (so sánh nhat).

exercises.original: She is the most beautiful girl I have ever known.
exercises.answer: I've never known a more beautiful girl than her.
exercises.explanation: the most...ever => never...a more...than.

exercises.original: Peter does not drive so carefully as Tom.
exercises.answer: Tom drives more carefully than Peter.
exercises.explanation: A not so...as B => B more...than A.

exercises.original: Yesterday the temperature was nine degrees. Today it's only six degrees.
exercises.answer: It is colder today than it was yesterday.
exercises.explanation: 6 do < 9 do => hom nay lanh hon hom qua.

exercises.wrongSentence: I found the conversation as most interesting and I was glad to practice my English.
exercises.correctSentence: I found the conversation most interesting and I was glad to practice my English.
exercises.explanation: Khong dung 'as' truoc 'most interesting'. 'most interesting' o day co nghia la 'rat thu vi'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The Caspian Sea, a salt lake, is the largest than any other lakes in the world.
exercises.correctSentence: The Caspian Sea, a salt lake, is larger than any other lakes in the world.
exercises.explanation: Voi 'than' phai dung so sánh hon 'larger', khong dung so sánh nhat 'the largest'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The Mekong is one of the longer rivers in the world.
exercises.correctSentence: The Mekong is one of the longest rivers in the world.
exercises.explanation: 'one of the + superlative + N(số nhiều)' => 'one of the longest'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The new models are not only less expensive but also the more efficient.
exercises.correctSentence: The new models are not only less expensive but also more efficient.
exercises.explanation: Day la so sánh hon (khong phai so sánh nhat), khong can 'the' truoc 'more'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The problem is the more serious because there has been no solution up to now.
exercises.correctSentence: The problem is more serious because there has been no solution up to now.
exercises.explanation: Day la so sánh hon binh thuong, khong phai so sánh kep. Bo 'the'.

exercises.wrongSentence: It's certainly true that the average woman has weaker muscles than that of the average man.
exercises.correctSentence: It's certainly true that the average woman has weaker muscles than those of the average man.
exercises.explanation: 'muscles' la số nhiều => dai tu thay the phai la 'those', khong phai 'that'.

exercises.wrongSentence: They asked many questions, checked the figures, and came up with best solution.
exercises.correctSentence: They asked many questions, checked the figures, and came up with the best solution.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhat phai co 'the': 'the best solution'.

exercises.wrongSentence: The first skill to learn is how to write the more important words, not whole sentences.
exercises.correctSentence: The first skill to learn is how to write the most important words, not whole sentences.
exercises.explanation: Khong co 'than' => day la so sánh nhat: 'the most important'.
